name: 智慧芽专利&文献融合检索
name_zh: 智慧芽专利&文献融合检索
description: Search Patsnap's global patent and literature databases with natural-language, semantic, keyword, and filtered queries.
description_zh: 在智慧芽全球专利数据库和文献库中进行融合检索，支持自然语言、语义搜索、关键词检索和多维过滤，并获取专利或文献信息。
description_en: Search Patsnap's global patent and literature databases with natural-language, semantic, keyword, and filtered queries, and fetch patent or literature details.
examples_zh: 帮我检索固态电池电解质相关的专利和论文
查找近五年 CRISPR 递送系统相关的核心专利和文献
获取公开号 CN109123456A 的专利基本信息和权利要求
帮我找宁德时代在钠离子电池方向的专利布局
examples_en: Search patents and papers about solid-state battery electrolytes.
Find key patents and literature on CRISPR delivery systems from the last five years.
Fetch the details for patent publication CN109123456A.
Analyze CATL's patent activity in sodium-ion batteries.
